headline: Is It Time To Reassess Bank Of America (BAC) After Its Recent Share Price Swings?
summary: If you are wondering whether Bank of America at around US$52.05 still offers value, it helps to break the story into what the price has done and what the fundamentals suggest. The stock has had mixed momentum recently, with a 3.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 6.8% gain over the past 30 days, a 7.0% year to date decline, and a 34.1% return over the last year, plus a 92.2% return over 3 years and 45.0% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on Bank of America as one of the major US banks...

headline: How The InterContinental Hotels Group (LSE:IHG) Investment Story Is Shifting With Mixed Street Views
summary: The analyst fair value estimate for InterContinental Hotels Group has edged up from US$146.48 to US$148.76, while external targets have moved into ranges such as US$150 to US$160 and around 13,000 GBp. These adjustments sit alongside mixed Street views, where some firms see the risk reward as attractive and others argue that recent share price strength already reflects much of the expected execution. As you read on, you will see what is driving this evolving narrative and how to track it over...

headline: Oracle data center $16 billion financing gets over the line
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A $16 billion financing for a giant Oracle Corp. data center in Michigan has wrapped after months of stop-and-start negotiations with investors.
